title: meowshroom
description: A new shroomy variant of cat spawning in mushroom fields, of course only if there is a village there.
body:
A new shroomy variant of cat spawning in mushroom fields, of course only if there is a village there.

You could also change their appearance by changing their names:
- RED: any name containing "mush" or "shroom"
- BROWN:any name containing "fungi", "fungus" or "rot"

Requires Optifine or any other mod that adds support for CEM.

If there is a bug try dming me on discord my id is: bombmee
